devpost-demo-en-clean.description: Capture-only English Devpost rehearsal with a clean workspace entrance and keyboard input.

expectedPaidWork.textTurns: opening advice, typed concept clarification and one image specification

devpost-demo-en-clean.requiredOutcome: A clean English capture from project creation through two conversational turns, concept review and one real draft, with no recorded consent/tutorial/feedback UI and no voice-input interaction.
